---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Who's affected by this gap today?

A clear description of the use case. Without a concrete user story, it's hard to evaluate the proposal.

## Proposed solution

What you'd like mcp-firewall to do. Be specific:

- New CLI command or flag?
- New configuration option?
- New module or integration?
- Change in existing behavior?

## Alternatives considered

Other ways you've thought about solving this. Why is this approach better?

## Example use case

A concrete walkthrough of how someone would use this feature:

```bash
# Before
mcp-firewall ...

# After
mcp-firewall ...
```

## Scope and complexity

Your guess at how much work this is:

- [ ] Small — config flag, single new function, straightforward
- [ ] Medium — new module or rule pack, requires design discussion
- [ ] Large — architectural change, needs an ADR

## Backward compatibility

- Does this break existing configurations?
- Does this break existing rules or audit log schema?
- If yes — what's the migration path?

## Additional context

Links to similar features in other tools, prior art, related issues, screenshots, mockups — anything that helps explain the idea.

## Pre-flight checklist

- [ ] I've checked [existing issues](https://github.com/churik5/mcp-firewall/issues) and [discussions](https://github.com/churik5/mcp-firewall/discussions) for similar proposals
- [ ] I've read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) and this fits the project scope (not in the "we'll usually decline" list)
- [ ] I'm willing to help implement this, or accept that the maintainer may not have time
